name: Tangy Blue Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the dried chives if the fresh is not available; otherwise, omit.
2. Blend the blue cheese and sour cream thoroughly.
3. Add all the other ingredients to the mixture and blend well.
4. Cover and chill.
5. Makes about 2 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Carrots, Cherry Tomatoes, Pineapple, Apple, Pear, Cocktail Black Bread, Italian Or French Bread Chunks
